hero.headline: Full-Stack Developer & Designer
hero.tagline: Creating complete digital experiences with clean UX, reliable backend, and AI-enhanced workflows
hero.aiWorkflowMention: Leveraging AI tools to enhance human creativity and efficiency

about.shortBio: Full-stack developer with expertise in React, Node.js, and modern web technologies. I combine technical skills with design thinking to create exceptional user experiences.
about.approach: I believe in human-centered design backed by solid technical implementation. My workflow integrates AI tools strategically to enhance creativity and efficiency while maintaining the human touch that makes great products.
about.experience: 3+ years of experience building web applications, from concept to deployment. Specialized in React ecosystems, RESTful APIs, and database design.

contact.responseTime: I typically respond to messages within 24-48 hours. For urgent inquiries, please mention it in your message.
contact.availability: Currently available for new projects and opportunities.
